title: Our Bali Honeymoon — March 2027
subtitle: Our Honeymoon Adventure
weatherNote: March weather: End of wet season — warm (27–32°C), occasional showers, lush & green
budgetTagline: For two people · 14 days · Budget-friendly style
budgetTable: FlightsRound-trip for 2 (varies by origin)$1,400–$2,000 Accommodation13 nights × avg $35/night (guesthouses + 1 luxury splurge)$580 Food & Drink$30/day for two (local warungs + 3 splurge dinners)$420 TransportAirport transfers, ferries, Gojek, scooter rental$150 ActivitiesCooking class, manta snorkeling, spa, temple entries$200 Travel InsuranceComprehensive for 2 weeks$80 MiscellaneousSIM card, tips, souvenirs, laundry$100
budgetNote: All prices approximate for March 2027 · $1 ≈ 16,000 IDR · Booking ahead on Agoda/Booking.com saves 15–30%

regions.name: Ubud
gettingThere: Airport to Ubud: Grab/Gojek $13–19 | or private transfer $25–30
Budget tip: Kura-Kura shuttle bus from Kuta $6/person (takes 3–4h)
Getting around: Scooter rental $3–5/day | Gojek rides $1–3

hotels.name: Eden House Ubud
hotels.desc: Traditional Balinese guesthouse, family-run, surrounded by rice fields 5min from center.

hotels.name: Bisma Eight (luxury splurge)
hotels.desc: Adults-only design hotel with an Infinity Pool overlooking the jungle canopy — one splurge night, one moment you'll remember forever.

hotels.name: Omank Agus Homestay
hotels.desc: Quiet family homestay, 10min walk to Ubud Palace. Highly rated for location & value.

hotels.name: Tegal Sari Accommodation
hotels.desc: Iconic budget stay right by the rice fields. Book on Agoda for lowest rates.

regions.hotelTipBox: 💡 Pro Tip: Most nights at Eden House, splurge ONE night at Bisma Eight for the infinity pool over the jungle.

attractions.name: Tegalalang Rice Terraces
attractions.vibe: Like walking through a living painting — layer after layer of luminous green stretching into the valley.
attractions.detail: Go before 8am when the light is golden and the crowds are gone.

attractions.name: Campuhan Ridge Walk
attractions.vibe: A peaceful ridge path suspended between two river valleys — just you, the breeze, and the sound of birds at dawn.
attractions.detail: Best at 6am — the light filters through morning mist.

attractions.name: Sacred Monkey Forest
attractions.vibe: Ancient temple grounds where over 1,200 long-tailed macaques roam freely through the jungle — equal parts magical and mischievous.
attractions.detail: Keep your belongings close — the monkeys are clever!

attractions.name: Tirta Empul Water Temple
attractions.vibe: A sacred spring where locals and visitors alike walk through cleansing fountains — a deeply moving Balinese ritual.
attractions.detail: Dress respectfully — sarongs are provided.

attractions.name: Tegenungan Waterfall
attractions.vibe: A powerful curtain of water crashing into a deep emerald pool — you can swim right up to it.
attractions.detail: 15 min drive from Ubud — best in the morning.

attractions.name: Balinese Cooking Class
attractions.vibe: Starting at the market buying fresh spices, then cooking together in an open-air kitchen surrounded by rice fields — a couples highlight.
attractions.detail: Paon Bali is top-rated — includes market tour.

attractions.name: Ubud Palace & Art Market
attractions.vibe: The ornate palace in the heart of town opens onto a vibrant market where artisans sell handmade silk scarves, wooden carvings, and silver jewelry.
attractions.detail: Palace is free — Kecak dance performances at 7:30pm.

attractions.name: Couples Spa Treatment
attractions.vibe: A candlelit room with the scent of frangipani — both of you side by side, melting into a 90-minute Balinese massage.
attractions.detail: Ubud Traditional Massage is $8–12 — hotel spas are $50+.

regions.name: Nusa Penida
gettingThere: Sanur → Nusa Penida: Fast boat $7–12/person | 30–45 min
Penida → Seminyak: Combined ferry+bus $12–17/person | ~2.5h
On island: Scooter rental $5–8/day | private driver $30–40/day

hotels.name: Kamasan Cottage
hotels.desc: The mid-range sweet spot — pool, breakfast included, great value.

hotels.name: Pondok Kana & Hostel
hotels.desc: Beachfront with private double rooms. Great value & close to ferry drop-off.

hotels.name: Maskot Penida Cottage
hotels.desc: Cheapest decent private bungalow on the island. Basic but clean.

regions.hotelTipBox: 💡 Pro Tip: Roads are rough — hire a private driver ($30–40/day) instead of a scooter. Book Kamasan Cottage for the best comfort-to-price ratio. Ferries from $7 on 12Go.asia.

attractions.name: Kelingking Beach (T-Rex Cliff)
attractions.vibe: A cliff perfectly shaped like a T-Rex plunging into turquoise water — the most iconic view in all of Bali.
attractions.detail: Steep 30–45 min hike down to a hidden white-sand beach.

attractions.name: Angel's Billabong & Broken Beach
attractions.vibe: A natural infinity pool carved into the cliff — at low tide it's a crystal-clear jacuzzi overlooking the ocean.
attractions.detail: Two spots are 5 min apart — check tides before going.

attractions.name: Crystal Bay
attractions.vibe: Calm turquoise water with 300+ coral species just offshore — snorkel straight from the beach.
attractions.detail: Best afternoon spot to relax after the morning cliff hikes.

attractions.name: Diamond Beach & Atuh Beach
attractions.vibe: White sand framed by jagged diamond-shaped cliffs — quieter than the west side, pure tropical paradise.
attractions.detail: On the east coast — combine with Rumah Pohon treehouse.

attractions.name: Snorkeling with Manta Rays
attractions.vibe: Gliding silently above a manta ray the size of a car as it sweeps past beneath you — one of those moments where time stops.
attractions.detail: Manta Point tour — 2h, best March–November.

attractions.name: Teletubbies Hill & Rumah Pohon
attractions.vibe: Rolling green hills that look like they belong in a fantasy film, with a wooden treehouse perched on the clifftop edge.
attractions.detail: Rumah Pohon offers the "Thousand Islands" viewpoint.

regions.name: Seminyak
gettingThere: Nusa Penida → Seminyak: Combined ferry+bus ticket $12–17/person (2.5h)
Seminyak → Airport: Gojek/Grab $6–10 | 25–40 min (10 km)
Getting around: Walkable in central areas | Gojek $1–3

hotels.name: The Hepburn Seminyak
hotels.desc: Recently renovated boutique guesthouse with stunning pool area. Top-rated on Booking.com.

hotels.name: Comoda Seminyak
hotels.desc: Charming boutique hotel with pool-view rooms & breakfast delivered to your room.

hotels.name: K Hostel Seminyak
hotels.desc: Adults-only with private doubles. Couples rate location 9.9 — best budget deal.

regions.hotelTipBox: 💡 Pro Tip: The Hepburn (9.6 rating) is the top couples pick. For cheapest private room, K Hostel at $20/night is unbeatable. Seminyak is very walkable.

attractions.name: Sunset at Potato Head / KU DE TA
attractions.vibe: Lying on a daybed by the infinity pool as the sky turns orange over the ocean — cocktails in hand, your first sunset.
attractions.detail: Potato Head is iconic — KU DE TA is more intimate.

attractions.name: Seminyak Beach
attractions.vibe: Miles of golden sand stretching into the sunset — grab a colorful beanbag, order a Bintang, and just watch the waves roll in.
attractions.detail: La Plancha has the beanbags — perfect for sunset.

attractions.name: Eat Street (Jalan Kayu Aya)
attractions.vibe: A lively street lined with candlelit restaurants, cocktail bars, and boutique stores — every night feels like date night.
attractions.detail: From local warungs to fine dining — something for every mood.

attractions.name: Revolver Espresso / Sisterfields
attractions.vibe: The best brunch in Bali — smoothie bowls topped with fresh fruit, avocado toast, and flat whites that rival Melbourne.
attractions.detail: Revolver has a speakeasy vibe — Sisterfields is bright and airy.

attractions.name: Couples Spa Day
attractions.vibe: Side by side on a candlelit treatment table, frangipani-scented oil — this is the kind of spa day you'll both remember.
attractions.detail: Prana Spa or Bodyworks — book a 2h couple's package.

attractions.name: Uluwatu Sunset Kecak
attractions.vibe: An ancient cliff temple at the southern tip of Bali, hosting the most dramatic Kecak fire dance as the sun sets behind dancers and ocean.
attractions.detail: Show starts at 6pm — arrive by 5:15 for good seats.
